evidence.evidence_text: Effect of waste foundry sand (WFS) as partial replacement of sand on the strength, ultrasonic pulse velocity and permeability of concrete Gurpreet Singh a,⇑, Rafat Siddique b a Civil Engineering Department, RIMT (IET), Mandigobindgarh, Punjab, India b Civil Engineering Department, Thapar University, Patiala 147004, India article info Article history: Received 7 March 2011 Received in revised form 3 June 2011 Accepted 18 June 2011 Available online 16 July 2011 Keywords: Concrete Waste foundry sand Strength properties Ultrasonic pulse velocity Permeability abstract Ferrous and non ferrous metal casting industries produce several millions tons of byproduct in the world. In India, approximately
